subcodes.first_line: O My Pen! Make mention of him who hath been named the Beloved, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of God, the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی ان اذکر من سمی بالحبیب لیفرح بذکر الله مالک الاسماء و یکون من
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @chastisement and requital
